title: Reference ROM Validation Manifest
description: Schema for curated ROM validation manifests used by Nexen regression testing. Each entry describes a reference ROM with expected checksums, mapper type, and test harness bindings.

description.description: Human-readable description of this manifest's purpose.

plainLanguageNote.description: Additional context for collaborators (e.g., provenance disclaimers).

systems.description: List of platform sections, each containing ROM entries.

nextStep.description: Notes for manifest curators on next actions.

id.description: Stable identifier for this entry (slug format, must be unique within the manifest).

romFileHint.description: Expected filename in the local reference ROM collection (C:\~reference-roms\{platform}\). No path separators.

sourceNote.description: Provenance note describing the source of this ROM dump.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the ROM file (lowercase hex, 64 chars). Use 'replace-with-real-sha256' as placeholder.

romSizeBytes.description: Expected ROM file size in bytes.

disabled.description: Set to true to skip this entry during validation runs.

disabledReason.description: Explanation for why this entry is disabled.

expectedResults.description: Expected validation results for this ROM.

harness.description: GTest test suite name that validates this ROM type.

summaryDigest.description: Expected deterministic digest from the harness (capture from known-good run).

frameCount.description: Number of frames to run for digest validation.
